title: Celeste Discs
description: Datapack that adds new music discs from game Celeste
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c25742f96c23bbacb338971ec971ce7d56dec48.png)
## Found bug / order datapack / other - [Discord](https://discord.gg/dCWyMsE94D).

### This datapack was intended to add discs with music from game Celeste.

Each disc has its own unique generation. At the moment there are only 6 songs in the datapack.

### Resource pack in datapack version! Don't forget to download it (Optifine not required)

## All 6 discs:
![Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee93f197fab0a911e60d1141613c9b67bba3ca47.png)


<details>
<summary>Generations: (SPOILER)</summary>

### Lena Raine - Starjump:
25% in stronghold crossing chest
### Maxo - Forsaken City:
25% in igloo chest
### Lena Raine - Resurrections:
25% in end city chest
### Lena Raine - Scattered and Lost:
25% in mansion chest
### Lena Raine - Quiet and Falling:
25% in ancient city chest
### Lena Raine - Farewell:
25% drop from ender dragon

</details>


<details>
<summary>Commands to give yourself discs</summary>
  
```
/function erkatom:give_disc/farewell
/function erkatom:give_disc/forsaken_city
/function erkatom:give_disc/quiet_and_falling
/function erkatom:give_disc/resurrections
/function erkatom:give_disc/scattered_and_lost
/function erkatom:give_disc/starjump
```

</details>


<details>
<summary>Copyright for songs</summary>

I don't have any rights to these songs, I took them all from YouTube channel: [Lena Raine](https://www.youtube.com/@LenaRaine). Below I have attached all the links to the songs.

- [Lena Raine - Starjump](https://youtu.be/dTIeaqNXseY)
- [Maxo - Forsaken City](https://youtu.be/6LbXujfutWk)
- [Lena Raine - Resurrections](https://youtu.be/1rwAvUvvQzQ)
- [Lena Raine - Scattered and Lost](https://youtu.be/0etenwnI1wo)
- [Lena Raine - Quiet and Falling](https://youtu.be/FjG0ivBT4lQ)
- [Lena Raine - Farewell](https://youtu.be/VXIqXaX1blY)

</details>
